$ mkdir -p /tmp/cache-test
$ CACHE_DIR=/tmp/cache-test save_cache "scripts/test.sh" "abc" "hello"
$ cat /tmp/cache-test/test.sh-abc
hello
$ CACHE_DIR=/tmp/cache-test save_cache "scripts/test.sh" "def" "world"
$ CACHE_DIR=/tmp/cache-test is_cache_valid "scripts/test.sh" "abc"; echo $?
1
$ CACHE_DIR=/tmp/cache-test is_cache_valid "scripts/test.sh" "def"; echo $?
0
$ rm -rf /tmp/cache-test
